picks.quote: stylistically made for Tyson, and of course, he won comfortably. I gave him that one... But this one... Tyson fighting Mariusz Wach is 46... the guy's never been any good.
AJ's opponent Christian Prenga has had 20 fights... And yes, he's not fought anywhere near the level of AJ.
I think it's a safe fight for Usyk. He knows he can win. and And second time round, he knows what to expect.
